leftSection.text: Got doubts? Do not worry, we have got you covered. Here you will find answers to the most common questions about Keyboard Breaker, from how the timer works to who can participate. Focus on speed, consistency, and typing accuracy. Click on Learn More to know in detail about the event.

faqs.question: What is Keyboard Breaker?
faqs.answer: Keyboard Breaker is a fast-paced typing competition where participants are ranked by speed and accuracy under a ticking timer.

faqs.question: Who can participate?
faqs.answer: Anyone with basic typing familiarity, from beginners to advanced typists, is welcome to join.

faqs.question: How does the timer work?
faqs.answer: Each typing round comes with a set time limit. Participants must complete and submit their attempt before the timer runs out.

faqs.question: What do winners get?
faqs.answer: Winners will earn recognition, certificates, and exciting prizes for outstanding typing speed and accuracy.
